pr.title: Non-Record: 11L Parallel Muon + LeakyReLU² MLP3x + Legal TTT (val_bpb 1.1253)

output.summary: 11L transformer leverages Parallel Muon banking, LeakyReLU² MLP3x, and legal score-first TTT with sliding-window scoring plus SGD refinement before quantization.
techniques: Parallel Muon parameter banking with batched Newton-Schulz
LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP3x with gating, residuals, and partial RoPE
Legal score-first TTT using sliding-window scoring then SGD before quantized deployment
